sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ سَمِيرٌ إِلَى مُقَابَلَةِ عَمَلٍ جَدِيدَةٍ صَبَاحَ الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Samir je jutros otišao na razgovor za novi posao.
sentences.translationEn: Samir went to a new job interview this morning.

sentences.arabic: لَبِسَ مَلَابِسَ رَسْمِيَّةً وَحَمَلَ سِيرَتَهُ الذَّاتِيَّةَ.
sentences.translation: Obukao je formalnu odjeću i ponio svoj CV.
sentences.translationEn: He wore formal clothes and carried his CV.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْمُدِيرُ لَطِيفًا وَسَأَلَهُ عَنْ خِبْرَاتِهِ السَّابِقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Direktor je bio ljubazan i pitao ga je o njegovim prethodnim iskustvima.
sentences.translationEn: The manager was kind and asked him about his previous experiences.

sentences.arabic: شَعَرَ سَمِيرٌ بِالثِّقَةِ لِأَنَّهُ اسْتَعَدَّ جَيِّدًا.
sentences.translation: Samir se osjećao samouvjereno jer se dobro pripremio.
sentences.translationEn: Samir felt confident because he prepared well.
